description: Fueled by fiction & creativity (especially Japanese games, music & manga) since I'm young, my entire life thus far has been nothing but a total focus on what drives and inspires me. Fascinated by interesting sounds and ambitious visuals, I've always been drawn to media that bring out the best aspects of both music and immersive aspects of all visual arts. Even back when I wasn't even a teen, I started drawing comics simply because I felt like it, and already felt a surge of inspiration just from organizing projects with friends. Nowadays, I've got a strong focus on  music, especially in the doujin/DTM scene. God knows what the future has in store for me, but I'm all for discovering new passions. All that I know is that for now, I'd do anything to work even further in the world of music & games!
